title: osmunda regalis var. palustris
intro: Osmunda regalis var. palustris, also known as the royal fern or swamp royal fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Osmundaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Osmunda regalis var. palustris include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic to aid in detoxification and weight loss. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
